title: Yardley London Contemporary Mini Fragrance Collection – Gardenia & Cassis and Orchid & Vanilla Eau de Toilette, Long-Lasting, Elegant Perfumes for Women, Floral Scent, Women’s Mini Set for Gifting

amazon_product_details_section.Delivery information: : We cannot deliver certain products outside mainland UK ( Details). We will only be able to confirm if this product can be delivered to your chosen address when you enter your delivery address at checkout.

features: SIGNATURE ENGLISH FLORALS – Discover the timeless elegance of Yardley’s finely crafted mini fragrance set, blending Gardenia & Cassis with Orchid & Vanilla for a captivating white floral journey that gently reveals modern British character in every spritz.

BOTANICAL HERITAGE BLEND – Inspired by English gardens, these eau de toilette scents balance fruity, woody and sweet notes, delivering a contemporary twist on classic botanicals for those who cherish gentle yet enduring fragrance sets.

DAILY SPRITZ OF LUXURY – Experience soft feminine confidence each day; the long-lasting mini perfume set offers effortless layering or solo wear, creating subtle yet memorable moments from busy mornings to calm evenings.

CRAFTED WITH CARE – The essence of these perfumes reflects centuries of British perfumery tradition, beautifully presented as a thoughtful perfume gift set for her, always reassuringly refined and modern.

MOMENTS THAT LINGER – Whether gifting or treating yourself, these contemporary mini perfumes provide a sense of fresh comfort and lasting fragrance, lending a graceful touch to every ritual from casual outings to special occasions.
